session.user: Run this command and report results: uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/codespace/setup_cmd.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/codespace/abc.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/codespace/real.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/codespace/fake.py Report any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run the type check command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run type checking on codespace files

session.assistant:
ty passed: All checks passed!
The type checking completed successfully with no errors found in the specified files: - src/erk/cli/commands/codespace/setup_cmd.py - packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/codespace/abc.py - packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/codespace/real.py - packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/codespace/fake.py
